entries.t: suf. 用以构成名词或形容词,表示具有…性质(的), 与…有关的; 用以构成感叹词

interj. 啊, 唉, 哎呀, 哦
n. 零
[计] 操作, 运算, 输出
entries.d:
n. the 15th letter of the Roman alphabet
n. the blood group whose red cells carry neither the A nor B antigens

entries.t: [医] O型, 菌体型, 不动型(细菌)
prep. “of”的缩写(如o'clock等), “on” 的缩写
entries.d:
A prefix to Irish family names, which signifies grandson or
descendant of, and is a character of dignity; as, O'Neil, O'Carrol.
prep. A shortened form of of or on.
